ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Cocoa powder, no added sugars, powder, instant
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: compound chocolate (65% *) (sugar, vegetable oil, milk solids and/or whey powder (milk), cocoa powder, emulsifiers (soy lecithin, 492), natural flavour, salt), honeycomb (35%*) (liquid sugar, glucose syrup, raising agent (sodium bicarbonate), beef gelatine, starch).
